CREATE TABLE welch_ttest (sample_data Float64, sample_index Int32);
INSERT INTO welch_ttest VALUES (1.5, 0), (2.5, 0), (3.0, 1), (4.0, 1);
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM welch_ttest;
INSERT INTO welch_ttest VALUES (0.0, 0), (2.0, 0), (3.0, 1), (5.0, 1);
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM welch_ttest;
CREATE TABLE welch_test_data (sample_data Float64, sample_index Int32);
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM welch_test_data;

SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM (SELECT sample_data, sample_index FROM welch_test_data WHERE sample_index = 0) AS a JOIN (SELECT sample_data, sample_index FROM welch_test_data WHERE sample_index = 1) AS b ON a.sample_data != b.sample_data;
CREATE TABLE sample_groups (id Int32, sample_data Float64, sample_index Int32);
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM sample_groups GROUP BY id;
INSERT INTO welch_ttest VALUES (10.5, 0), (11.5, 1), (12.5, 1), (13.5, 0);
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM welch_ttest WHERE sample_index = 0;
CREATE TABLE large_sample_data (sample_data Float64, sample_index Int32);
INSERT INTO large_sample_data SELECT number % 10 + 0.5 AS sample_data, number % 2 AS sample_index FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10000;
SELECT welchTTest(sample_data, sample_index) FROM large_sample_data;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (col1 Float64, col2 Float64, sample_index Int32);
SELECT welchTTest(col1 + col2, sample_index) FROM complex_data;
